name: io.github.chrischall/vibo-mcp
description: Vibo (vibodj.com) MCP — plan & manage event music: timeline, songs, ideas, questions, guests

environmentVariables.name: VIBO_EMAIL
environmentVariables.description: Vibo account email (or use VIBO_ACCESS_TOKEN for SSO accounts)

environmentVariables.name: VIBO_ACCESS_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Captured x-token from a signed-in web.vibodj.com session (SSO alternative)

environmentVariables.name: VIBO_REFRESH_TOKEN
environmentVariables.description: Matching x-refresh-token so the session can renew
